name: St Ives Country Club
description:
Celebrate your special day in unparalleled luxury and elegance at our exquisite country club wedding venue which includes a bridal suite and groom's lounge. Nestled within breathtaking landscapes, St Ives 45,000 square-foot stone encased Clubhouse sits majestically atop one of the highest points in North Fulton County offering a picturesque backdrop for your outdoor wedding ceremony and indoor reception. Our stunning golf course and scenic views provide the perfect canvas for capturing timeless wedding photos.
	
	Once inside, you experience the feeling of an 18th century English country manor. Whether your special day is small and intimate or larger in size, St Ives Country Club provides the perfect elegance and impeccable service to meet your every need.
	
	Our venue spaces can hold from 50 to 250 guests in either a cocktail or seated style setting.

					Welcome to Mossy Oak Farm Wedding and Events				
				
					
				
				
				
							
					
						
				
				
				
					When the Moment Matters...				
				
				
				
									When the moment matters and your special day requires a very special place, like home, turn to Mossy Oak Farm Weddings and Events. Our beautiful and unique space can accommodate large or intimate affairs that will bring you moments to remember. Boasting over 150 acres of land, our spacious barn has 126 acres to accommodate the largest company events, and across the road, we offer a more intimate cabin and pond setting on 26 acres that provides the perfect backdrop for all your photography. When you’re looking for a premium space to discover the joys and beauty of Georgia, you’ve discovered Mossy Oak Farm. We look forward to making your event an incredible experience.

 .sidebar--footer .widget [class*="social"] > ul a:hover:before { color: #C59D5F; }
.sidebar--footer__dark { background-color: #121212; }
.sidebar--footer,
 .sidebar--footer .widget [class*="social"] > ul a:before { color: #FFFFFF; }
.btn--top_text .btn__arrow { border-color: #FFFFFF; }
.copyright-text a,
 .nav--footer a:hover,
 .site-footer .separator--flower { color: #C59D5F; }
.sidebar--footer__accent, 
 .copyright-area.copyright-area__accent { background-color: #C59D5F; }
.copyright-area.copyright-area__dark { background-color: #252525; }
.copyright-area svg path { fill: #252525; }
.copyright-area {color: #FFFFFF91;}
@media  screen and (min-width: 900px) { 

	.site-header { padding-top: 5px; }

	.nav--main > .menu-item > a { padding-left: 13px; }

	div.page { padding-left: 12px; }

}

@media screen and (min-width: 900px)  { 

	.site-header { padding-bottom: 5px; }

	.nav--main > .menu-item > a { padding-right: 13px; }

}

@media  screen and (min-width: 900px)  { 

	#page { margin-top: 5px; }

	.article__header:first-of-type + .article--page{
	margin-top: -12px;
}

}

@media  screen and (min-width : 900px) { 

	#page { top: 5px; }

}

@media screen and (min-width: 900px) { 

	body > .page, .site-header { border-width: 12px; }

}

@media   screen and (min-width: 900px) { 

	body .navigator, div.page { padding-right: 12px; }

}

@media     screen and (min-width: 900px) { 

	.site-footer { border-bottom-width: 12px; }

}

@media  only screen and (min-width: 900px) { 

	.page .type-page .article__content { padding-top: 78px; }

	.sidebar--main { width: 300px; }

}

@media only screen and (min-width: 900px)  { 

	.page .type-page .article__content { padding-bottom: 78px; }

	.page-content.has-sidebar:after { right: 300px; }

}

@media only screen and (min-width : 900px) { 

	.page-content.has-sidebar .page-content__wrapper { margin-right: 300px; }

}

@media  only screen and (min-width : 900px) { 

	.page-content.has-sidebar{
	margin-right: -300px;
}

}

@media only screen and (max-width: 899px) { 

	.navigation--main .nav--main li.menu-item-has-children a:before {background-color: #12121280;}
	.navigation--main .nav--main li a,
 .shop-menu-item .shop-menu-item__price { color: #CCCCCC; }

	body .navigation--main { background-color: #252525; }

}

@media only screen and (max-width: 899px)  { 

	.navigation--main .nav--main {border-color: #CCCCCC30;}
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 899px)   { 

	.widget_shopping_cart_content {background-color: #CCCCCC19;}
}

description:
Lying nestled amongst the beauty and grandeur of historic
downtown Roswell, Founders Hall is a unique, historic special event
facility, which offers all of the elegance and grace reminiscent of
the Antebellum South. Continuing in our tradition of southern
charm, we offer affordable elegance in the way of weddings, social events and corporate events. With an experienced
catering and event management staff,
no detail of your event, from beginning to end, will be overlooked.
Roswell Founders Hall offers indoor and outdoor wedding ceremonies
for up to 200 guests in our grand ballroom and courtyard. Our grand
ballroom can seat up to 200 guests for a seated dinner and the home
can hold up to 300 guests for a strolling event utilizing the
entire property. We can customize the layout of every event to fit
your particular needs.

description: The Velo Vineyard is your one-stop shop for planning your next party or event.  We have the perfect place, in-house event consultants, and a gourmet caterer. We also have a full-service bicycle shop.  What more could you want?  Stop by or give us a call.  We will help you plan your next fabulous event or get you ready for the next Tour de France!

name: Under the Oaks Wedding Venue
description: Under the Oaks Wedding Venue is a Wedding Dream Come True! Seating for up to 200 people, ceremony held under the oak trees or in the barn, hand crafted benches, chairs and tables provided. Make lasting memories with the ones you love on your special day!

description: LoftĒ is a new event loft and natural light studio designed with your intimate event in mind. It’s perfect for meetings, workshops, trainings, or projects that offers an open floor plan with unlimited possibilities.

name: Summit at 8West
description:
Located on the 8th Floor of the 8West building. This modern space offers 
stunning views of the Atlanta skyline. Warm wood and dark hues frame the 
panoramic views from the front door throughout the entire venue. Coupled 
with the rooftop rental option, Summit at 8West provides a truly memorable 
location for every occasion.

description: Nestled on 15-acres in Barney, Georgia, Hempstead Estate has five serene ponds reflecting the Georgia sky and surrounding pine trees. Our stunning estate offers  settings for dreamy weddings, birthday parties, and special celebrations. We ensure every detail is executed with precision and care, crafting celebrations that embody southern hospitality and grace. Create cherished memories surrounded at Hempstead Estate wedding venue.
